summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3X ETF (SOXL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Semiconductor index. The fund provides 3x daily exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index of 30 US-listed semiconductor companies. SOXL was launched on Mar 11, 2010 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: SOXL is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt stock at 18.72%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 13.85%, Cash at 10.47%, Jp Morgan 100 Us Trsy Capital 3163 at 5.88%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 5.31%.
